description: Self-hosted auth guides mixed with UI components and docker config
rationale: apps/docs/content/guides/self-hosting/ contains 'auth' in oauth path = auth domain (458 lines). NavigationMenu.constants.ts imports React = ui domain via semantic analysis (10 lines). docker-compose.yml = config domain (43 lines). 3 unrelated domains = ERROR.
notes: Previously warning (auth+config=2 domains). Semantic analysis now correctly identifies NavigationMenu.constants.ts as UI via React import detection, adding a third domain.
